prompt:
Add a tool to update a series' quality profile in Sonarr. The agent can already fetch quality profiles (get_quality_profiles) and series details (get_series_detail), and UpdateSeries exists in the client — it just needs a tool that ties them together.

## File structure (per-service files from recent refactor)
- Tool definitions: internal/agent/tools_sonarr.go
- Dispatch logic: internal/agent/dispatch_sonarr.go
- Client: internal/sonarr/client.go
- Types: internal/sonarr/types.go
- Destructive tools map: internal/agent/tools.go

## Implementation

### 1. New tool: update_series_profile
Add to tools_sonarr.go:
- Input struct: seriesID int (required), qualityProfileID int (required)
- Description: 'Update the quality profile for a series. Use get_quality_profiles to find available profile IDs and get_series_detail to see the current profile.'
- Mark destructive in tools.go

### 2. Dispatch (dispatch_sonarr.go)
Add case 'update_series_profile':
1. Unmarshal input
2. Call a.sonarr.GetSeries(ctx, input.SeriesID) to get full series
3. Set series.QualityProfileID = input.QualityProfileID
4. Call a.sonarr.UpdateSeries(ctx, series)
5. Return updated series info

This uses the existing UpdateSeries client method — no new client code needed. The Series struct already has QualityProfileID.

### 3. Same for Radarr: update_movie_profile
Add to tools_radarr.go + dispatch_radarr.go:
- Input: movieID int, qualityProfileID int
- Same pattern: GetMovie, set QualityProfileID, UpdateMovie
- Mark destructive

## Testing
Run 'go test ./...' before creating the PR.
